title: IT Trainer ( MCT / ACLP Cert) | Bugis - YZ11
description:
Full Title : IT Trainer

Location: Bugis

Working days: 5 days (Mon - Fri)
Working time: 9.00 to 6.00 pm


Overview: We are seeking an experienced IT Trainer to deliver technical training to internal teams, partners, and end-users. The ideal candidate must have a background in IT systems and applications and preferably hold the Advanced Certificate in Learning and Performance (ACLP). This role includes instructional delivery and training content development, with an emphasis on Microsoft courses and other relevant IT courses.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Deliver instructor-led and virtual classroom training on Microsoft technologies (e.g., Microsoft 365, Azure, Power Platform, Copilot, Sharepoint) and other IT system as required.
  • Work closely with key vendors to ensure training content is accurate, up-to-date, and aligned with business needs.
  • Provide technically relevant instruction, assessment, and feedback in both lecture and hands-on lab environments.
  • Prepare and maintain comprehensive course syllabus, ensuring all learning objectives are clearly defined.
  • Design, update, and maintain all instructional course materials, including manuals, presentations, and training content.
  • Utilize training technologies such as video conferencing, distance learning platforms, and Learning Management Systems (LMS).
  • Conduct training needs analysis to identify skill gaps and recommend appropriate learning solutions.
  • Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and IT practices.
  • Evaluate training effectiveness and implement improvements based on feedback and performance metrics.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Proven experience as an IT Trainer, Technical Instructor, or similar role.
  • Knowledge of enterprise software, productivity tools, and IT systems.
  • Familiarity with adult learning principles and instructional design methodologies.
  • Certifications such as Microsoft Certified Trainer (MCT), ACLP and others related to vendor certifications are a plus.
  • Experience with e-learning tools and Learning Management Systems (LMS) is an advantage.


Interested applicants, WA your resume to ‪‪‪‪‪‪+65 9136 9792‬‬‬‬‬‬ or email your resume to supreme.yentan@gmail.com.



TAN YEN ZHEN (CHEN YANZHEN) REG NO: R25138932

THE SUPREMEHR ADVISORY PTE LTD EA NO: 14C7279
